fileNodes.name: App.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Root React application component that sets up client-side routing, holds top-level user/cart state shared via context, and shows a location-permission prompt on load.

fileNodes.name: client.ts
fileNodes.summary: Central typed fetch wrapper exposing every backend API call used by the client, covering cart operations, catalog search, subscriptions, predictions, checkout and auth.

fileNodes.name: CartDrawer.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Slide-out cart panel with recommended/economical tabs, per-item quantity controls, budget summary and a checkout call-to-action.

fileNodes.name: Composer.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Primary multi-mode input composer (text, voice, budget) used on the home page to capture shopping intent and trigger cart building.

fileNodes.name: Footer.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Site footer with newsletter signup, PWA install prompt trigger, and category/legal navigation links.

fileNodes.name: NowCartVerified.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Small reusable badge component that renders a "NowCart Verified" trust signal on product listings.

fileNodes.name: ProductCard.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Reusable product tile showing image, rating stars, pricing and add/remove-from-cart controls, used across shop, search and home pages.

fileNodes.name: EngineTrail.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Renders a human-readable "why this happened" trail translating the cart-building engine's internal reasoning steps into plain language.

fileNodes.name: HitlPrompt.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Small human-in-the-loop confirmation prompt asking the user to proceed with the current cart or view alternatives.

fileNodes.name: ReplanBar.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Inline chat bar letting users give free-text or quick-chip feedback to swap items or replan the current cart.

fileNodes.name: WhyThisOne.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Expandable panel that humanizes the engine's reasoning trail and confidence score for why a specific product was chosen.

fileNodes.name: FrontDoorPanel.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Modal dispatcher that renders the correct "front door" intent-capture panel (constrain/predict/share/show/speak) based on the selected door.

fileNodes.name: PanelResult.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Shared result-summary UI (cart preview, item list, totals) rendered after any front-door panel finishes building a cart.

fileNodes.name: doors.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Static configuration array defining the five front-door entry points (constrain, predict, share, show, speak) with their icons and labels.

fileNodes.name: ConstrainPanel.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Front-door panel for capturing a budget and serving size to build a budget-constrained cart via the constraint API.

fileNodes.name: PredictPanel.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Front-door panel for subscription-based predictive reordering: manages recurring subscriptions, due-for-reorder carts, pantry tracking and personalized prediction insights.

fileNodes.name: SharePanel.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Front-door panel that accepts a shared recipe/social link or pasted text and parses it into a cart via the share-parse API.

fileNodes.name: ShowPanel.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Front-door panel for image-based intent capture, letting users take a photo or upload an image analyzed by the vision API to build a cart.

fileNodes.name: SpeakPanel.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Front-door panel for voice-based intent capture using the Web Speech API, including live transcription, follow-up voice commands, and cart updates.

fileNodes.name: main.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Application bootstrap entry point that mounts the React root and imports global CSS.

fileNodes.name: AboutPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Static "About Us" marketing page listing the team and company mission.

fileNodes.name: AdminDashboardPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Internal admin dashboard showing usage statistics, scaling info, and LLM/AWS cost breakdowns with periodic auto-refresh.

fileNodes.name: DeliveryInfoPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Static page describing delivery zones, timing windows and delivery policies.

fileNodes.name: HomePage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Landing page presenting the front-door intent panels and featured/recommended products to start a shopping session.

fileNodes.name: LoginPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Login and registration page handling user authentication against the backend auth API.

fileNodes.name: OrderHistoryPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Page listing a signed-in user's past orders fetched from the backend order-history API.

fileNodes.name: OrderSuccessPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Post-checkout confirmation page summarizing the placed order, payment method and estimated delivery time.

fileNodes.name: PaymentPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Checkout page handling delivery address, payment method selection (UPI, cards, wallets) and order placement, with numerous small icon/row sub-components.

fileNodes.name: PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Static privacy policy legal page.

fileNodes.name: ProductPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Single product detail page with pricing, description and add/remove-from-cart actions.

fileNodes.name: SearchResultsPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Search results page rendering products matching a catalog search query.

fileNodes.name: ShopPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Category browsing page listing products with filtering by category and search term.

fileNodes.name: SubscriptionsPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Page for managing recurring product subscriptions, including adding new subscriptions via brand search and adjusting frequency.

fileNodes.name: TermsPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Static terms & conditions legal page.

fileNodes.name: index.ts
fileNodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting shared UI primitives (Button, Card, Chip, Panel, Spinner, EmptyState, ErrorState, Toast provider, animation helpers) used across the client.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package init for the agents module that re-exports the LangGraph pipeline builder, node functions, and shared agent state for use by the outcome service.

fileNodes.name: graph.py
fileNodes.summary: Builds the LangGraph StateGraph wiring together intent, decompose, match, confidence, counterfactual, and replan nodes with conditional routing edges for the Outcome Engine pipeline.

fileNodes.name: nodes.py
fileNodes.summary: Implements the core LangGraph node functions (intent, decompose, match, confidence, counterfactual, replan) that make up the Decompose -> Match -> Optimize -> Confidence outcome pipeline, including LLM prompt construction and catalog matching logic.

fileNodes.name: state.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines the AgentState schema shared across all LangGraph nodes, carrying raw input, needs, candidates, cart, confidence, and conversation context through the pipeline.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Aggregates and re-exports all FastAPI controller routers (admin, cart, catalog, auth, orders, outcome, share, vision, voice, etc.) for registration with the main app.

fileNodes.name: admin.py
fileNodes.summary: Admin-only FastAPI endpoints for overriding product stock status and triggering badge recomputation.

fileNodes.name: cart.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI endpoints for cart mutation operations (add/remove/update/clear items) and cart retrieval, delegating to CartOpsService.

fileNodes.name: constraint.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI endpoint that builds a budget-constrained cart by delegating to BudgetService.

fileNodes.name: health.py
fileNodes.summary: Simple health-check endpoint returning service status for uptime monitoring.

fileNodes.name: outcome.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI endpoint that accepts free-text intent requests and routes them through OutcomeService to produce a cart.

fileNodes.name: share.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI endpoint for parsing shared content (URLs or text) into a cart, including a demo-mode cart builder used when DEMO_ENABLED is set.

fileNodes.name: vision.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI endpoint that analyzes an uploaded image (or runs in demo mode) to extract a shopping cart via VisionService.

fileNodes.name: voice.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI endpoint that handles voice transcript intents (or runs in demo mode) and routes them through OutcomeService to produce a cart.

fileNodes.name: cart.py
fileNodes.summary: Domain models for Cart, CartItem, and Substitution representing the core shopping cart entity manipulated throughout the outcome pipeline.

fileNodes.name: enums.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines core domain enumerations IntentMode and NeedStatus used to classify user intent and need resolution state.

fileNodes.name: need.py
fileNodes.summary: Domain model representing a single decomposed shopping need (name, quantity, unit, matched product) produced by the decompose node.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package init that re-exports request and response DTO classes for use by controllers.

fileNodes.name: requests.py
fileNodes.summary: Pydantic request DTOs (OutcomeRequest, VoiceIntentRequest, ConstraintRequest, ShareRequest, CartOpRequest, SosRequest, StockOverrideRequest) defining the API's inbound payload contracts.

fileNodes.name: responses.py
fileNodes.summary: Pydantic response DTOs (HealthResponse, ProductResponse, CartResponse, etc.) with from_domain factory methods converting domain models into API-facing shapes.

fileNodes.name: budget_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Service that builds and trims a shopping cart to fit within a user-specified budget by iteratively dropping lowest-priority items.

fileNodes.name: outcome_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Central orchestration service that injects user context (profile, preferences, recent orders) and invokes the LangGraph outcome graph to turn intent into a cart; also supports feedback-driven replanning.

fileNodes.name: share_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Service that fetches and parses shared URLs or text (stripping HTML) and uses an LLM to extract shopping intent, then delegates to OutcomeService to build a cart.

fileNodes.name: vision_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Service that sends an uploaded image to a vision LLM provider to extract grocery items and quantities, then builds a cart via OutcomeService.

fileNodes.name: auth.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI controller exposing registration, login, and profile-lookup endpoints; hashes passwords, assigns roles by email heuristic, and reads/writes users via the repository layer.

fileNodes.name: catalog.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI controller exposing product search, recommendation, and single-product lookup endpoints backed by the catalog service and repository.

fileNodes.name: orders.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI controller handling order placement, item rating submission, and order-history retrieval, coordinating cart cache, repository, and badge service.

fileNodes.name: subscribe.py
fileNodes.summary: Large FastAPI controller for the predictive-restock feature set: subscription management, predicted/due carts, preference insights, recently-ordered items, cart replanning, and counterfactual explanations.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package barrel re-exporting the domain model classes (Cart, CartItem, Substitution, IntentMode, NeedStatus, Need, Order, Product, User, UserLocation) for convenient importing.

fileNodes.name: order.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines the Order domain model representing a placed order with items, total, status, and payment details.

fileNodes.name: product.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines the Product domain model representing a catalog item with pricing, stock, rating, and tag metadata.

fileNodes.name: user.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines the User and UserLocation domain models representing account and location/demographic data.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Repository/cache factory module providing get_repository() and get_cache() singletons, selecting DynamoDB or in-memory repository based on configuration.

fileNodes.name: base.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines the abstract Repository interface with methods for product and user CRUD and order storage, implemented by concrete repositories.

fileNodes.name: cache.py
fileNodes.summary: Cache abstraction layer with an in-process fallback and an optional Redis-backed store, used to cache carts, stock overrides, and generic responses.

fileNodes.name: memory.py
fileNodes.summary: In-memory implementation of the Repository interface storing products, users, and orders in plain dictionaries; used for local development/testing.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Services package barrel that lazily proxies attribute access to catalog_service to preserve backward-compatible imports.

fileNodes.name: badge_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Computes and persists product 'badges' (e.g. bestseller, trending) from order history and stores per-item ratings submitted by users.

fileNodes.name: cart_ops_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Core cart-mutation service providing get/save/add/remove/update/clear operations on a user's cached cart, including economical-alternative substitution logic.

fileNodes.name: catalog_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Central catalog service implementing product search, relevance scoring, recommendations, availability checks, and fuzzy need-to-product matching used throughout the intent-capture pipeline.

fileNodes.name: counterfactual_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Generates human-readable explanations for why alternative products were rejected in favor of a selected cart item, based on price, rating, and preference signals.

fileNodes.name: pantry_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Derives a user's recently-ordered/pantry-staple products from order history with days-since-last-order metadata.

fileNodes.name: preference_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Computes and caches a user's shopping-preference profile (brand affinity, category frequency, price tier, product loyalty) from order history for personalization.

fileNodes.name: subscribe_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Largest service in the batch: predicts restock needs from order-history patterns, builds starter carts for new users, and manages recurring product subscriptions (add/remove/due/build-cart).

fileNodes.name: sqs_publisher.py
fileNodes.summary: Wraps AWS SQS to publish asynchronous job messages (e.g. background tasks) with job type/status enums and a singleton publisher accessor.

fileNodes.name: meta.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI controller exposing operational/meta endpoints: system stats, system info, AWS cost breakdown, and an observability dashboard for monitoring the deployed service.

fileNodes.name: config.py
fileNodes.summary: Central application settings (Pydantic Settings) covering environment, LLM provider selection and API keys, data backend, caching, and semantic search/prediction tuning, exposed via a cached get_settings() accessor.

fileNodes.name: logging.py
fileNodes.summary: Configures the application's root logging handler/formatter and provides a get_logger helper for module-scoped loggers.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package barrel for the llm module, re-exporting the base provider interfaces and factory functions.

fileNodes.name: base.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines abstract base interfaces LLMProvider and VisionProvider that concrete LLM/vision providers (Groq, Gemini, Bedrock, Mock) implement.

fileNodes.name: bedrock_provider.py
fileNodes.summary: LLMProvider implementation backed by AWS Bedrock's converse API, with response caching and JSON/text completion methods.

fileNodes.name: factory.py
fileNodes.summary: Factory selecting the active text and vision LLM providers (Groq, Bedrock, Gemini, or Mock) based on application settings.

fileNodes.name: gemini_provider.py
fileNodes.summary: LLMProvider and VisionProvider implementations backed by Google Gemini, supporting API key rotation and JSON/text/image completion with fenced-code stripping.

fileNodes.name: groq_provider.py
fileNodes.summary: LLMProvider implementation backed by the Groq API, with API key/client rotation, response caching, and JSON/text completion.

fileNodes.name: mock_provider.py
fileNodes.summary: Deterministic mock LLM/vision providers used as fallbacks or for local development/testing when no real LLM API key is configured.

fileNodes.name: main.py
fileNodes.summary: Application entry point wiring up the FastAPI app: lifespan startup seeding data/catalog/semantic index, middleware registration, router inclusion, and exception handlers.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package barrel re-exporting the PII redaction, rate limiting, request ID, and telemetry middleware classes.

fileNodes.name: pii_redaction.py
fileNodes.summary: Middleware and regex-based helper that redacts emails and phone numbers from request bodies before logging for privacy compliance.

fileNodes.name: rate_limit.py
fileNodes.summary: Token-bucket based rate limiting middleware that throttles requests per client, protecting the API from abuse.

fileNodes.name: request_id.py
fileNodes.summary: Middleware that assigns or propagates a request correlation ID for tracing requests across logs.

fileNodes.name: telemetry.py
fileNodes.summary: Middleware that records per-request latency, error, and cart metrics into an in-process metrics store, exposing get_metrics_snapshot for the meta/observability endpoints.

fileNodes.name: confidence_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Scores confidence of matched cart items and flags low-confidence items or ambiguous matches that need user clarification.

fileNodes.name: semantic_search_service.py
fileNodes.summary: Hybrid product retrieval service combining bi-encoder embedding search, cross-encoder reranking, and RapidFuzz fallback to match user query text against the product catalog, with embedding caching to disk.

fileNodes.name: dynamodb.py
fileNodes.summary: DynamoDB repository implementing the primary datastore access layer: table provisioning and CRUD operations for products, users, and orders via aioboto3, with helpers to convert between Python floats and DynamoDB Decimal types.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package init for the seed module that re-exports catalog loading, mock data generation, and stock override helpers as the public seed API.

fileNodes.name: __main__.py
fileNodes.summary: CLI entry point for `python -m app.seed`; orchestrates loading the catalog, applying stock overrides, seeding mock users/orders, and writing everything into the configured repository and cache.

fileNodes.name: catalog.py
fileNodes.summary: Loads and normalizes the product catalog from CSV or XLSX datasets into domain Product models, generating stable product IDs, parsing units, tags, ratings, and descriptions.

fileNodes.name: mock_data.py
fileNodes.summary: Generates hardcoded mock User and Order domain objects used to seed the demo/dev environment with realistic sample data.

fileNodes.name: seed_dynamodb.py
fileNodes.summary: High-level seeding routine that provisions DynamoDB tables and bulk-loads catalog, stock override, mock user, and mock order data into DynamoDB, plus a helper to check whether seeding already occurred.

fileNodes.name: stock_overrides.py
fileNodes.summary: Derives a deterministic subset of product IDs to be marked as out-of-stock/overridden for demo purposes, based on a hash of the full product ID set.

fileNodes.name: AddressManager.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Modal/sheet UI component for managing saved delivery addresses, letting users detect their location via GPS reverse-geocoding or add/edit addresses manually with labels (Home/Work/Other).

fileNodes.name: Header.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Site header component with search bar (animated placeholder), navigation category links, cart button, user menu, PWA install trigger, and the delivery address selector that opens AddressManager.

fileNodes.name: PwaInstallPrompt.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Dismissible toast/banner component that prompts eligible users to install the PWA after a delay, persisting dismissal state to localStorage.

fileNodes.name: LocationContext.tsx
fileNodes.summary: React context that wraps the useDeliveryLocation hook so delivery-location state is shared app-wide via a single provider instance, exposing a useLocation() accessor hook.

fileNodes.name: useLocation.ts
fileNodes.summary: Core delivery-location logic: localStorage-backed saved addresses, Nominatim reverse-geocoding for GPS coordinates, and the useDeliveryLocation hook exposing address CRUD, active-address selection, and GPS detection.

fileNodes.name: usePwaInstall.ts
fileNodes.summary: Hook that detects PWA install eligibility across platforms (standalone mode detection, iOS Safari heuristics, beforeinstallprompt capture) and exposes a triggerInstall function.

fileNodes.name: Button.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Shared button UI primitive with variant (primary/secondary/accent/outline/ghost) and size styling, a built-in loading spinner state, and left/right icon slots used across the client app.

fileNodes.name: Spinner.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Small reusable SVG loading spinner component with configurable size, className, and accessible label, used inside Button and other async UI states.

fileNodes.name: States.tsx
fileNodes.summary: UI primitives for common empty and error states, each accepting an icon/title/description and an optional retry/action Button, used to give consistent feedback screens across the app.

fileNodes.name: Panel.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Accessible modal/bottom-sheet UI primitive used by the app's front doors — traps focus, locks body scroll, and closes on Escape or backdrop click, rendering as a bottom sheet on mobile and centered dialog on larger screens.

fileNodes.name: Toast.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Toast notification system providing a React context provider and hook for showing dismissible, auto-expiring toast messages across the app.

fileNodes.name: Transition.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Lightweight animation wrapper components (fade and pop-in entrance transitions) reused by other UI primitives like Panel.

fileNodes.name: Dockerfile
fileNodes.summary: Multi-stage Docker build for the NowCart Vite/React/TypeScript frontend: compiles static assets with Node in a builder stage, then serves them via a hardened Nginx runtime image with SPA routing/API proxy config and a health check.

fileNodes.name: builder
fileNodes.summary: Build stage based on node:20-alpine that installs npm dependencies with `npm ci` and runs `npm run build` to produce the Vite production bundle.

fileNodes.name: runtime
fileNodes.summary: Runtime stage based on nginx:alpine that replaces the default nginx config with a custom SPA-routing/API-proxy config, copies the built assets from the builder stage, exposes port 80, and defines a container health check.

fileNodes.name: Dockerfile
fileNodes.summary: Multi-stage Docker build for the FastAPI backend: a builder stage installs Python dependencies via uv into a virtualenv, and a slim runtime stage copies the venv plus application code, runs as a non-root user, exposes port 8000, and starts uvicorn with a health check for EC2 deployment.

fileNodes.name: builder
fileNodes.summary: Build stage based on python:3.11-slim that installs the uv package manager and resolves/installs Python dependencies from server/pyproject.toml and server/uv.lock into an isolated virtualenv at /app/.venv.

fileNodes.name: runtime
fileNodes.summary: Final slim python:3.11-slim runtime image that copies the prebuilt virtualenv and application code, adds the BigBasket.csv data file, drops privileges to a non-root user, exposes port 8000, defines a HEALTHCHECK, and launches the app with uvicorn.

fileNodes.name: deploy.yml
fileNodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow that deploys NowCart on every push to master: builds the Vite frontend and syncs it to S3 with CloudFront cache invalidation, then SSHes into the EC2 host to write the production .env, git pull the backend, and restart the systemd nowcart service.

fileNodes.name: deploy-frontend
fileNodes.summary: Job that checks out the code, installs and builds the client with npm, then syncs the built dist/ folder to the nowcart-frontend-strizzy S3 bucket and invalidates the CloudFront distribution cache.

fileNodes.name: deploy-backend
fileNodes.summary: Job that runs after deploy-frontend succeeds; SSHes into the production EC2 instance to write environment secrets to /opt/nowcart/server/.env and /etc/nowcart.env, then git pulls the latest master branch and restarts the nowcart systemd service.

fileNodes.name: .dockerignore
fileNodes.summary: Excludes Python virtualenv/cache dirs, Node modules/build output, IDE/OS artifacts, and .env secret files from Docker build contexts.

fileNodes.name: APK_BUILD_GUIDE.md
fileNodes.summary: Step-by-step guide for building, signing, and hosting the NowCart Android APK (Android Studio, Gradle signing config, S3/EC2 hosting) plus notes on the already-live PWA.

fileNodes.name: ARCHITECTURE_DIAGRAM.md
fileNodes.summary: High-level visual architecture diagram of NowCart with a one-minute walkthrough of how requests flow through the system.

fileNodes.name: NowCart_Presentation_Script.md
fileNodes.summary: Full slide-by-slide presentation script for a hackathon grand finale pitch, covering the product story, demo voiceover, technical architecture, algorithms, and growth roadmap.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Project README describing NowCart's purpose, how it works, its architecture, tech stack, local development setup, deployment, and admin access.

fileNodes.name: SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE.md
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive system architecture document detailing the LangGraph Outcome Engine node-by-node (intent, decompose, pantry filter, match/RAG, optimize, substitute, confidence, counterfactual), the Zero Door predictive restock path, data flow diagrams for each entry mode, middleware stack, LLM provider architecture, hybrid retrieval, infrastructure, scaling, observability, and security hardening.

fileNodes.name: archi.md
fileNodes.summary: Hybrid system architecture diagram and one-minute presentation script explaining key implementation details behind the diagram.

fileNodes.name: deploy.bat
fileNodes.summary: Windows batch script that builds the frontend, syncs the build to an S3 bucket, invalidates the CloudFront distribution, and reminds the operator to SSH into EC2 to restart the backend service.

fileNodes.name: docker-compose.yml
fileNodes.summary: Local development Docker Compose stack wiring together the FastAPI backend, nginx-served Vite frontend, Redis (cache/session), and DynamoDB Local (persistence), each with health checks and a shared bridge network.

fileNodes.name: backend
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI backend service built from server/Dockerfile, configured via environment variables for DynamoDB, Redis, Groq/Gemini LLM providers, and CORS; exposes port 8000.

fileNodes.name: frontend
fileNodes.summary: Nginx-served Vite frontend built from client/Dockerfile, exposed on port 3000 and depending on the backend being healthy.

fileNodes.name: redis
fileNodes.summary: Redis 7 Alpine service providing cart/session state and LLM response caching, with a persistent volume and periodic save policy.

fileNodes.name: dynamodb-local
fileNodes.summary: Local DynamoDB emulator service (amazon/dynamodb-local) for product/user/order persistence during development, backed by a persistent volume.

fileNodes.name: requirements.md
fileNodes.summary: Kiro spec-driven requirements document for NowCart defining 10 numbered requirements (Outcome Engine, Voice-to-Order, Constraint-First Ordering, Show It/Share It, Comparison Collapse & Confidence Score, Substitution Intelligence, SOS/Emergency Mode, Catalog & Data, Architecture/Scaling/Cost, and Frontend Revamp & Backend Sync) each with acceptance criteria, plus an introduction and glossary.

fileNodes.name: design.md
fileNodes.summary: Architecture and design document for NowCart describing the layered backend (controllers/middleware/services/agents/repositories/llm/models), the LangGraph Outcome Engine node pipeline, REST API surface, data models (Product/Cart/Need), storage layout (DynamoDB/Redis), error handling, privacy/scaling strategy, and seven correctness properties that the implementation must satisfy.

fileNodes.name: tasks.md
fileNodes.summary: Implementation plan for NowCart breaking work into 9 dependency-ordered waves (foundation/LLM providers, data layer + seed, catalog matching, LangGraph Outcome Engine, supporting services, REST API + middleware, React/Vite/TS frontend, frontend revamp & backend sync, verify + deploy), with per-task verification steps and completion checkboxes.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Boilerplate Vite React+TypeScript README describing the default template, React Compiler note, and guidance for expanding the ESLint configuration.

fileNodes.name: index.html
fileNodes.summary: Vite entry HTML for the NowCart PWA client, wiring PWA meta tags, Apple touch icons, Google Fonts, and mounting the React app via src/main.tsx.

fileNodes.name: package.json
fileNodes.summary: NPM manifest for the NowCart React client, defining Vite build/dev scripts, OpenAPI type generation, Capacitor Android packaging, and dependencies including React 19, Tailwind CSS v4, react-router-dom, and lucide-react.

fileNodes.name: tsconfig.app.json
fileNodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the client application source, setting bundler module resolution and strict type-checking options for files under src/.

fileNodes.name: tsconfig.json
fileNodes.summary: Root TypeScript project reference file that composes tsconfig.app.json and tsconfig.node.json for the client's split app/tooling build configuration.

fileNodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
fileNodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for Node-context tooling files (e.g. vite.config.ts), enabling strict type-checking with bundler module resolution separate from the app build.

fileNodes.name: settings.json
fileNodes.summary: Claude Code project settings file listing enabled plugins for the local development assistant.

fileNodes.name: .config.kiro
fileNodes.summary: Marker/config file for the Kiro spec-driven development tool tied to the user-authentication feature spec.

fileNodes.name: requirements.md
fileNodes.summary: Requirements document for a user-authentication feature (signup, OTP verification, login, JWT token management, auth UI, session persistence/logout, and user data storage) written in EARS acceptance-criteria format.

fileNodes.name: .understandignore
fileNodes.summary: Ignore-pattern list controlling which files and directories the Understand-Anything knowledge graph scanner excludes from analysis.

fileNodes.name: capacitor.config.ts
fileNodes.summary: Capacitor configuration for packaging the NowCart web client as a native mobile app, defining app ID, name, and web directory settings.

fileNodes.name: eslint.config.js
fileNodes.summary: ESLint flat-config for the client codebase, defining linting rules and plugin setup for TypeScript/React source files.

fileNodes.name: gen-icons.mjs
fileNodes.summary: Node build script that generates app icon assets (favicons/mobile icons) for the client from a source image.

fileNodes.name: nginx.conf
fileNodes.summary: Nginx server configuration used to serve the built client SPA and proxy API requests in production/container deployment.

fileNodes.name: schema.d.ts
fileNodes.summary: Auto-generated TypeScript type definitions describing the backend API's request/response schema, used for typed API client calls.

fileNodes.name: Button.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Reusable styled Button UI component supporting variants, sizes, loading state, and icon slots.

fileNodes.name: cn.ts
fileNodes.summary: Tiny utility module exporting a class-name concatenation helper used across UI components.

fileNodes.name: index.css
fileNodes.summary: Global stylesheet defining base styles, CSS custom properties (design tokens like shadows/colors), and Tailwind layer imports for the client app.

fileNodes.name: SosPage.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Minimal placeholder page component for an SOS/emergency-help route in the client app.

fileNodes.name: Card.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Reusable Card UI component providing surface styling, padding variants, and optional interactive hover states.

fileNodes.name: Chip.tsx
fileNodes.summary: Reusable Chip/badge UI component with tone and size variants, optionally rendering a leading icon.

fileNodes.name: vite.config.ts
fileNodes.summary: Vite build configuration for the client app, defining plugins, dev server settings, and build output options.

fileNodes.name: add_5000_more.py
fileNodes.summary: Data-generation utility script that appends roughly 5000 additional product/catalog records, verifying associated image URLs before inclusion.

fileNodes.name: check_cors.py
fileNodes.summary: Diagnostic script for verifying CORS headers/behavior of the NowCart backend API.

fileNodes.name: check_page2.py
fileNodes.summary: Small ad-hoc script for inspecting/testing a second page of paginated data or results, likely used during catalog debugging.

fileNodes.name: create_verified_csv.py
fileNodes.summary: Data-pipeline script that builds a CSV of catalog records after verifying each entry's image URL is valid and reachable.

fileNodes.name: find_placeholders.py
fileNodes.summary: Scans catalog data rows to detect placeholder or invalid product images by comparing downloaded content size against expected thresholds.

fileNodes.name: fix_placeholders.py
fileNodes.summary: Remediation script that re-checks and replaces placeholder/broken product images identified in the catalog data.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Empty package marker file establishing the server.app Python package.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package docstring/init module describing the async_jobs architecture: API endpoint to SQS queue to Lambda function to DynamoDB result, with frontend polling for completion, used to offload heavy operations like vision analysis and cart decomposition.

fileNodes.name: lambda_handlers.py
fileNodes.summary: AWS Lambda handler stubs for offloaded async jobs — vision analysis, share/decomposition, and outcome processing — invoked via SQS to scale heavy operations outside the main API process.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Empty package marker file that makes server/app/core a Python package for core cross-cutting concerns (config, settings, shared infrastructure).

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package marker for server/app/models with a docstring documenting the two subpackages — `domain` for internal models (e.g. Cart, Product) and `dto` for wire contracts (e.g. CartResponse, OutcomeRequest) — instructing consumers to import directly from the subpackages rather than this barrel.

fileNodes.name: pyproject.toml
fileNodes.summary: Python project configuration for the nowcart-server package, declaring dependencies (FastAPI, LangGraph, LangChain, Groq, Google Generative AI, boto3/aioboto3, Redis, sentence-transformers, rapidfuzz, httpx, orjson, tenacity), dev/test dependencies, pytest asyncio settings, and the hatchling build backend.
